system.description: You create and can now wield a powerful artifact: Big Hand. Big Hand is a long, elegant, sword-like weapon that deals no Harm. It can be activated by hitting a target or by tapping it against any clock. When you wield Big Hand alone, roll [quality].

outcomes.success: the target is hit with Big Hand. They experience the last thing that Harmed them again, receiving an equal amount of Harm. Tapped clocks ignore this effect.
outcomes.triscendence: you can experience the next 60 seconds in any order. You may bring any objects or people you can hold with you as you travel between seconds in this way.
outcomes.eachplus3:
you may choose one of the following:
  • Time advances by one minute.
  • Time rewinds by one minute.
  • A nearby target hears a distracting “tick tock” sound in their mind that prevents them from focusing on any complex plan, math, or speech for the next minute.
  • A nearby timer advances to its end and the task it was applied to completes (the toast pops out, a parking meter hits its limit, etc.)
outcomes.failure: the next thing that Harms you does so twice, for double the Harm.
